InstanceRenewal.instanceId: The ID of the virtual machine instance
InstanceRenewal.action: The value of this parameter in this API: purchaseReserved
InstanceRenewal.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [{clientToken} Idempotency](BCC/API Reference/General Notes.md#Idempotency).
InstanceRenewal.relatedRenewFlag: Sets the associated renewal flag for the instance. Defaults to an empty string. For available flags, refer to [RelatedRenewFlag](BCC/API Reference/Appendix.md#RelatedRenewFlag). **Note**: CDS disks attached to the instance will be renewed together.
InstanceRenewal.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method, including Prepaid, Postpaid, and bidding (spot instance)
InstanceRenewal.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid.
InstanceRenewal.cdsCustomPeriod: Custom renewal period for attached disks. Must be greater than or equal to (BCC expiration time after renewal - current CDS expiration time), ranging from 1 to 60 months. If not specified, defaults to match the BCC expiration time after renewal.
InstanceRenewal.cdsCustomPeriod.volumeId: Disk ID (returned by the disk details or disk list API)
InstanceRenewal.cdsCustomPeriod.period: Renewal duration in months, ranging from 1 to 60. The disk expiration time after renewal must be equal to or later than the BCC expiration time; otherwise the renewal will fail.
